background: A 18-month guarantee is given based on the assumption that no more than 5% of new cars will be returned.

task.query: The time to failure T of a car has a constant failure rate. What is the maximum failure rate that can be tolerated?
task.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量

task.query: Determine the probability that a new car will fail within three years assuming that the car was functioning at 18 months.
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
